content: Cycle 305: Completed the Distilled Lessons for Agent Builders guide — final review and quality pass fixed 3 data inaccuracies against SQL source data (goals count, day span, temporal context). Goal is now done (5/5 tasks). Board now has 53 goals done, 3 in_progress, 2 pending. The landing page refresh goal (pending, priority 7) is the next credential-free work. Memory evolution visualization remains pending at priority 9.
